assertions.title: Frontend shows testnet data
assertions.reason: Frontend connectivity to testnet API/WS endpoints is evident and /market + /depth were populated on retry, but required proof of chart using live testnet trade data could not be confirmed because /trades and /candles were empty when 200 and frequently 429-rate-limited.

steps.action: Open frontend at http://localhost:3102 and capture UI state
steps.expected: Chart, token header, and swap widget are visible and aligned to CASH/USD1
steps.observed: Candle chart rendered, token header showed CASH price panel, and swap widget showed USD1 -> CASH.

steps.expected: Endpoints respond with populated market and depth data
steps.observed: After retry/backoff due 429, /market returned CASH/USD1 active market metadata and /depth returned non-empty bids/asks.

steps.expected: Trades/candles provide live testnet data to support chart evidence
steps.observed: Repeated /trades and /candles checks were mostly 429; one 200 response each returned empty arrays ([]).

commands: agent-browser --session browser-rerun open http://localhost:3102 && agent-browser --session browser-rerun wait --load networkidle
assertions.issues: Live testnet trade/candle data prerequisite missing during run (empty arrays and intermittent rate limiting), preventing pass-level evidence for this assertion.

assertions.title: Full testnet swap lifecycle
assertions.reason: Swap execution from UI could not be completed due missing provisioned sign-capable wallet session in browser; assertion requires wallet signing and trade execution.

steps.action: Open wallet connect flow from frontend
steps.expected: A connectable wallet is available to sign swap transaction
steps.observed: Wallet modal displayed provider/install options (Petra/Nightly/Backpack Install links) but no connected funded wallet session was available.

steps.action: Attempt full lifecycle verification (swap -> transactions -> chart update)
steps.expected: Swap executes and appears in transactions + chart
steps.observed: Could not execute swap; transactions table remained 'No recent transactions' and no new trade evidence observed.

commands: agent-browser --session browser-rerun click @e3 (Connect Wallet) && agent-browser --session browser-rerun screenshot <evidence>/VAL-CROSS-001-wallet-modal.png
agent-browser --session browser-rerun click @e9 (Close) && agent-browser --session browser-rerun screenshot <evidence>/VAL-CROSS-001-post-modal.png
assertions.issues: Prerequisite gap: no funded wallet extension/session available for signing live frontend swap transactions.

assertions.title: Chart historical + live continuity
assertions.reason: Historical chart and transition marker were visible, but live post-marker continuity could not be validated because live trades/candles were unavailable during test window.

steps.action: Switch chart to 1Y timeframe and inspect continuity
steps.expected: Historical candles + transition marker + live continuation appear without gap
steps.observed: Historical series and 'New Ve…' transition marker were visible on chart; no observable live continuation segment was produced.

steps.action: Cross-check live feed prerequisites via API
steps.observed: Endpoints were frequently 429 and returned [] when successful.

commands: agent-browser --session browser-rerun click @e10 && agent-browser --session browser-rerun screenshot --full <evidence>/VAL-CROSS-002-chart-1Y.png
assertions.issues: Live continuity prerequisite unmet (no live trade/candle stream observable during validation).

assertions.title: Real-time candle update
assertions.reason: Real-time OHLC mutation could not be exercised because no new trade events were observable in UI/API during the run.

steps.action: Capture candlestick chart state, wait 15s, capture again
steps.expected: Rightmost candle updates OHLC/wick in-place when new trades arrive
steps.observed: Before/after screenshots show effectively unchanged candle state (only time-axis progression), with no observable live OHLC mutation.

steps.action: Check trade/candle endpoints for incoming data
steps.observed: Endpoints were rate-limited frequently and returned empty arrays when 200.

commands: agent-browser --session browser-rerun screenshot --full <evidence>/VAL-CANDLE-006-before-wait.png && agent-browser --session browser-rerun wait 15000 && agent-browser --session browser-rerun screenshot --full <evidence>/VAL-CANDLE-006-after-wait.png
assertions.issues: Missing live trade events prevented deterministic real-time candle-update validation.

frictions.description: API endpoint rate limiting (429) repeatedly interrupted browser and curl checks, requiring timed retries/backoff loops.
frictions.resolution: Used multiple delayed retries and captured first successful 200 responses for /market and /depth.

blockers.description: No provisioned/funded sign-capable wallet session available in browser validator isolation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal and checked available providers/extensions; only install/connect options were available.

blockers.description: Live trade/candle prerequisite unavailable during run: /trades and /candles mostly 429 and empty when 200.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried endpoints five times with sleeps and captured both 429 and 200 responses.

summary: Revalidated 4 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 4 blocked. Frontend connectivity and populated /market + /depth evidence were confirmed, but wallet-signing and live trade/candle prerequisites were not met in this run.
